MODULE: cosmos.plugins.loader
FILE: cosmos/plugins/loader.py (311 lines)
CATEGORY: plugins

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Plugin Loader

Discovers and loads plugins from the filesystem.

CLASSES:
- PluginLoader: Loads plugins from the filesystem.

Supports:
- Single-file plugins (plugin_name
  Methods: def discover(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: def load(self, plugin_path: str) -> Optional[Plugin]
  Methods: def unload(self, module_name: str) -> bool

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_plugin_template(name: str, plugins_dir: str='./plugins', capabilities: List[str]=None) -> str
